captain_rankings.name: Bowen
captain_rankings.notes: Nailed talisman, must-win relegation decider vs Leeds; two double-figure home hauls in last 3; max motivation.

captain_rankings.name: Mbeumo
captain_rankings.notes: Brentford full-strength chasing Europe vs Liverpool; key threat, high motivation, open-game upside.

captain_rankings.name: M.Salah
captain_rankings.notes: Confirmed start in farewell match; elite ceiling but vs motivated Brentford and dead-rubber LIV context.

captain_rankings.name: Mateta
captain_rankings.notes: Nailed Palace #9 with pride to play for; solid floor, no special fixture edge.

captain_rankings.name: Wood
captain_rankings.notes: Confirmed Forest striker vs Bournemouth; reliable starter, modest ceiling.

captain_rankings.name: Rogers
captain_rankings.notes: HIGH-CEILING DIFFERENTIAL: rotation lottery post-Europa-final, minutes managed away at Man City, no league motivation. Big rank-swing upside ONLY if he starts; otherwise zero.

captain_rankings.name: Gabriel
captain_rankings.notes: DOUBTFUL + Arsenal rotated entire XI post-title (CL final pending); did not start. Heavy availability penalty.

high_ceiling_differential.name: Rogers
high_ceiling_differential.note: HIGH-CEILING DIFFERENTIAL: rotation lottery post-Europa-final, minutes managed away at Man City, no league motivation. Big rank-swing upside ONLY if he starts; otherwise zero.

tc_chip_recommendation: HOLD / let TC expire rather than force it. GW38 is a rotation minefield: Haaland (Gemini's TC anchor) is OUT of the MCI squad and would score zero. No elite double-fixture or banker exists. If TC is used at all, Bowen is the only defensible target given his must-win motivation and 53.6% haul rate, but the final-GW ceiling is capped vs a normal banker — expected TC gain is only ~6.2 extra pts over a standard captain, below the usual TC bar.
summary: Monte Carlo (10k draws) ranks Bowen (WHU) as captain at EV 12.41 pts (captained), 53.6% haul — nailed in a must-win relegation decider. Mbeumo (vice) is the safest low-rotation backup. Haaland excluded (UNAVAILABLE), Gabriel near-void (avail risk). High-ceiling differential: Rogers (AVL) — EV only 4.08 from ~55% bench risk, but ceiling 9.22 captained IF he starts; pure rank-swing punt.
